channel.title: byteFinancialOO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from byteFinancialOO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why ‘Managing by Walking Around’ Can Backfire, According to New Research
item.description: A study finds that scripted walk‑arounds may make employees feel monitored rather than supported.

item.title: My secret to remembering people
item.description: Let me tell you my trick for remembering the names of people I meet: I don’t. It’s not for lack of caring. It’s just that my stupid brain seems to onl...

item.title: Bob Diamond: The settlement window is closing as 24/7 trading opens up
item.description: Hyperliquid isn't a crypto casino, the ex-Barclays CEO says. it's a demonstration of how financial markets look when you strip out decades of friction...

item.title: How to Lead the Unmanaged
item.description: Why independent contractors require better leadership than employees
